display.purpose: Page-level titles. One per page maximum.

body.purpose: Reading text, cap at 65–75ch for prose.

numeric.purpose: Any P&L, balance, percent readout. Tabular figures mandatory.

shadows.name: subtle-dark
shadows.purpose: Resting state of primary buttons in dark mode.

shadows.name: subtle-light
shadows.purpose: Resting state of primary buttons in light mode.

shadows.name: card-dark
shadows.purpose: Cards and panels in dark mode.

shadows.name: card-light
shadows.purpose: Cards and panels in light mode.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default state transition for color, opacity, transform.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Trader Violet fill, white text, 8 px corners.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #7c3aed; color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.55; letter-spacing: 0; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #5b21b6; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(124,58,237,0.25); }

components.name: Outlined Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent body, violet text and border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outlined { background: transparent; color: #7c3aed; padding: 8px 20px; border: 1px solid #7c3aed; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-outlined:hover { background: rgba(124,58,237,0.08); } .ds-btn-outlined:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(124,58,237,0.25); }

components.name: Side-Nav Item
components.description: Vertical icon-rail item: 22 px icon over an 11 px uppercase label.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { width: 100%; padding: 8px 4px; border: 0; background: transparent; color: #94a3b8; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #f1f5f9; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: rgba(124,58,237,0.12); color: #7c3aed; } .ds-nav-item span { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1.1; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Container surface for grouped content. Flat by default, lifts subtly on hover.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #131313; color: #f1f5f9; padding: 16px; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card__title { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #94a3b8; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card__numeric { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; font-feature-settings: 'tnum' on, 'lnum' on; }

components.name: Calendar Dropdown Item
components.description: Recent-calendar entry inside the Home dropdown. Selected state uses a left accent bar via ::before, not a side border.
components.html:
SD
Strategy Dataset
476 trades
+$6,814,311.00
components.css: .ds-cal-item { position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 32px 1fr auto; gap: 12px; align-items: center; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; background: transparent; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-cal-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); } .ds-cal-item--selected { background: rgba(124,58,237,0.12); } .ds-cal-item--selected::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 8px; bottom: 8px; width: 3px; border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0; background: #7c3aed; } .ds-cal-item__avatar { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 6px; background: rgba(124,58,237,0.18); color: #a78bfa; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; } .ds-cal-item__name { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #f1f5f9; } .ds-cal-item__sub { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; color: #94a3b8; } .ds-cal-item__pnl { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #22c55e; font-feature-settings: 'tnum' on, 'lnum' on; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: Tag, status, or filter chip. 6 px corners, label typography.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; background: #7c3aed; color: #f8fafc; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Standard text input. 8 px corners, paper background, violet focus glow.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #131313; color: #f1f5f9; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.55; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #7c3aed; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(124,58,237,0.15); }

narrative.overview: JournoTrades looks and behaves like a digital descendant of an analog trading logbook. Pages of structured ledgers, columns of figures, marginal notes in a steady hand. Not a marketing site, not a casino app, not a Bloomberg terminal. The system rejects the visual noise that has become a fintech reflex: no purple-to-pink gradient washes, no celebration animations, no skeuomorphic broker chrome, no terminal-style information avalanche. Hierarchy comes from spacing and weight contrast, not decorative elevation. Dark mode is the default surface, tuned for hours of staring on a second monitor in dim or mixed light.
keyCharacteristics: Numbers carry the page; chrome stays out of the way.
Tabular numerals and calm spacing over flashy emphasis.
One purple, used sparingly. The accent is a signal, not a wallpaper.
Crisp 8/12 px corners. Nothing fully rounded except pills used as labels.
Motion is calm and exponential, defaulting to instant under reduced-motion.

rules.name: The One Purple Rule
rules.body: Trader Violet appears at most on ~10% of any screen surface. If a redesign starts to need violet on multiple structural surfaces, the layout is wrong, not the color.

rules.name: The Win/Loss Triple-Encoding Rule
rules.body: Profit and loss are never expressed by color alone. The pair (color + glyph + sign) is mandatory. No green text without an up-arrow and +. No red text without a down-arrow and -.

rules.name: The Pure-Pixel Rule
rules.body: Pure white is permitted only on the light-mode paper surface. Page backdrop, all neutrals, and any tinted area must be off-white to keep the system from looking sterile.

rules.name: The Tabular-Number Rule
rules.body: Any cell, list, or readout that renders a count, percent, or currency must use font-feature-settings: 'tnum' on, 'lnum' on. Proportional figures in P&L tables are forbidden.

rules.name: The Single-Display Rule
rules.body: A page may have one Display-size headline at most. Multiple display sizes flatten the hierarchy back into noise.

rules.name: The No-Glass Rule
rules.body: No backdrop-filter: blur decoration on cards, navs, or panels. The single permitted use is the lock-overlay backdrop and the calendar-switching spinner overlay.

rules.name: The Hover Lift Rule
rules.body: Cards may translate at most -2 px on hover, paired with the next shadow step up. No scale transforms, no rotation, no shadow expansion beyond one tier.

dos: Do lead with numbers. Tabular figures, calm labels, generous space around totals.
Do keep Trader Violet rare. One element on a screen is usually enough.
Do pair every win/loss color with both an arrow icon and the sign character.
Do vary spacing for rhythm: page-level sections at 32–48 px apart, related elements at 8–16 px.
Do write copy in trader voice. "476 trades, +$6,814,311.00", not "Your amazing trading journey".
Do keep AppHeader and SideNav mounted across navigation; loading states render below the chrome.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS purple gradients. Trader Violet is solid; it never gradients into pink, blue, or itself.
Don't clip text in a gradient with background-clip: text. Solid color, weight or size for emphasis.
Don't chase Bloomberg terminal density. Information without rhythm is noise.
Don't add Robinhood-style gamification: no confetti on green trades, no balloons, no celebration sounds, no oversized streak counters.
Don't mimic MetaTrader or legacy broker chrome: no skeuomorphic panels, no beveled buttons, no tiny system fonts, no gray-on-gray.
Don't wrap the entire interface in cards. Cards are an affordance, not a container reflex.
Don't use a border-left greater than 1 px as a colored accent stripe. The selected calendar item's 3 px accent bar uses ::before, not a side border.
Don't introduce glassmorphism (frosted blurs) as decoration. Reserve backdrop-filter for the lock and switch overlays.
Don't use #000 or #fff anywhere except the documented light-mode paper. Off-black #080808 and tinted paper are the system's true neutrals.
